info.name: Create a Subaccount owned by the authenticated Reseller

items.docs: Create a Subaccount owned by the authenticated Reseller

info.name: Get details for the specified Shopper

params.name: shopperId
params.description: Shopper whose details are to be retrieved

params.name: includes
params.description: Additional properties to be included in the response shopper object

items.docs:
Notes:
  • **shopperId** is **not the same** as **customerId**. **shopperId** is a number of max length 10 digits (*ex:* 1234567890) whereas **customerId** is a UUIDv4 (*ex:* 295e3bc3-b3b9-4d95-aae5-ede41a994d13)

info.name: Update details for the specified Shopper

params.name: shopperId
params.description: The ID of the Shopper to update

items.docs:
Notes:
  • **shopperId** is **not the same** as **customerId**. **shopperId** is a number of max length 10 digits (*ex:* 1234567890) whereas **customerId** is a UUIDv4 (*ex:* 295e3bc3-b3b9-4d95-aae5-ede41a994d13)

info.name: Request the deletion of a shopper profile

params.name: shopperId
params.description: The ID of the shopper to delete. Must agree with the shopper id on the token or header, if present. *Note*: **shopperId** is **not the same** as **customerId**.  **shopperId** is a number of max length 10 digits (*ex:* 1234567890) whereas **customerId** is a UUIDv4 (*ex:* 295e3bc3-b3b9-4d95-aae5-ede41a994d13)

params.name: auditClientIp
params.description: The client IP of the user who originated the request leading to this call.

items.docs:
Notes:
  • Shopper deletion is not supported in OTE
  • **shopperId** is **not the same** as **customerId**. **shopperId** is a number of max length 10 digits (*ex:* 1234567890) whereas **customerId** is a UUIDv4 (*ex:* 295e3bc3-b3b9-4d95-aae5-ede41a994d13)

info.name: Get details for the specified Shopper

params.name: shopperId
params.description: The ID of the shopper to retrieve. Must agree with the shopper id on the token or header, if present

params.name: auditClientIp
params.description: The client IP of the user who originated the request leading to this call.

items.docs:
Notes:
  • **shopperId** is **not the same** as **customerId**. **shopperId** is a number of max length 10 digits (*ex:* 1234567890) whereas **customerId** is a UUIDv4 (*ex:* 295e3bc3-b3b9-4d95-aae5-ede41a994d13)

params.name: shopperId
params.description: Shopper whose password will be set

items.docs:
Notes:
  • Password set is only supported by API Resellers setting subaccount passwords.
  • **shopperId** is **not the same** as **customerId**. **shopperId** is a number of max length 10 digits (*ex:* 1234567890) whereas **customerId** is a UUIDv4 (*ex:* 295e3bc3-b3b9-4d95-aae5-ede41a994d13)
